title: Universe 76
description: Enter Universe 76, the 76th world in Minecraft version 1.8. It was deleted. It was corrupted. Explore, then come back and tell me who really owned that land.
body:
![Vines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c2945c466c53bf9df583dfe7f9a738fc8ede3ea.png)
# What happens when you delete a world?
![Universe 76 Keyart](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PotatoWolfie/potatowolfie.github.io/94f8e20b442f6e449d9047c0a9d8b0226081b5bf/Universe76/wiki/MAK_beautyart.png)
This mod explores that idea. Things begin corrupting rapidly. Please note that this mod is set to be redeveloped entirely to convey this idea. This was my first mod, and I would like to recreate it. Some things in this description have innaccurate textures or features that won't be present in the recreation.
![Vines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e637db4933b4228dbb03844bccb9a1682154310.png)

## Etherealum Forest
Comes with the Etherealum Wood type
![The Etherealum Forest](https://i.postimg.cc/90QgY5K2/2024-04-20-21-15-36-modified.png)

## Ensarite Forest
Comes with the Etherealum Wood type
![The Ensarite Forest](https://i.postimg.cc/k5Vb8jfH/2024-04-20-21-31-45-modified.png)

## Corrupted Nexus
A new dimension accessed through the **Nexus Warp**, or building a portal with corrupted obsidian and lighting it with a **Nexus Opener** (Only forge can build the portal currently)
![The Corrupted Nexus](https://i.postimg.cc/bNKLstyp/2024-04-20-21-20-34-modified.png)

## Kunzite
Similar to iron tools
![Kunzite Gem Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cd6b3acf6883c8a9af84043eb1860df3fc6fdb5.png)

## Nexus Walker
A mob that spawns in the **Corrupted Nexus**

![Nexus Walker](https://i.postimg.cc/1thfFygg/image-2024-04-20-213619277.png)

(This model is only used in the Forge version, the fabric version has a human model!)

## Soul Lamp Block
A light block made from **souls.** (Not really)

![An image of the Soul Lamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87a52027194c2013ab0020c0df5438d5c4b6d9fd.png)

## Corrupted Bloom
A new Corrupted Flower

![Corrupted Bloom](https://i.postimg.cc/Qt4wPdpC/image-2024-04-20-214606092.png)

## Nexus Warp
An alternative to getting to the **Corrupted Nexus** (Only works in corrupted biomes)

![Nexus Warp](https://i.postimg.cc/LX9FwWwC/image-2024-04-20-214402717.png)

More features are coming soon!
